background.education: Princeton University, Georgetown University Law Center
background.experience: Investment Banker, Treasury Department Official, Fed Chair
background.philosophy: Price stability and maximum employment, data-dependency, 'Lower for longer' vs 'Higher for longer' inflation targeting
key_traits: Management of the dollar as global reserve currency

behavioral_patterns.monetary_policy: Reacts to lag indicators (employment, inflation). Uses 'Forward Guidance' to prepare markets for rate shifts.
behavioral_patterns.crisis_response: Provides unlimited liquidity (Quantitative Easing) during systemic shocks to prevent credit freeze.
behavioral_patterns.market_influence: Every word is scrutinized; can crash or pump global indices with a single adjective (e.g., 'transitory').

interaction_logic.with_politics: Maintains a facade of independence while managing the debt issued by the Treasury.
interaction_logic.with_global_banks: Coordinates with ECB and BoJ to prevent currency wars or liquidity crises.
interaction_logic.with_black_swans: Prioritizes banking system stability over individual market losses.
